allow: Bash(node -e " const api = require\('./node_modules/homey/node_modules/homey-api'\); // Deep search for HomeyAPI / createAppAPI function findKeys\(obj, depth\) { if \(depth > 3\) return; Object.keys\(obj||{}\).forEach\(k => { if \(k.includes\('Homey'\) || k.includes\('App'\)\) console.log\(' '.repeat\(depth*2\) + k\); if \(typeof obj[k] === 'object' && obj[k]\) findKeys\(obj[k], depth+1\); }\); } findKeys\(api, 0\); ")
Bash(node -e "const { HomeyAPI } = require\('homey-api'\); console.log\('HomeyAPI:', typeof HomeyAPI, typeof HomeyAPI.createAppAPI\);")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('files:', d.get\('files','not specified'\)\)")
